mapper.sql: select nr.id, nr.notification_no as notificationNo, nr.related_order_no as relatedOrderNo, nr.notification_type as notificationType, nr.target_url as targetUrl, nr.notify_status as notifyStatus, nr.retry_times as retryTimes, nr.scheduled_notify_time as scheduledNotifyTime, nr.next_retry_time as nextRetryTime, nr.payload_json as payloadJson, nr.response_code as responseCode, nr.response_message as responseMessage, nr.last_manual_retry_time as lastManualRetryTime, nr.last_manual_retry_reason as lastManualRetryReason, nr.last_manual_retry_result as lastManualRetryResult, nr.last_manual_retry_operator_id as lastManualRetryOperatorId, nr.last_manual_retry_operator_name as lastManualRetryOperatorName, nr.created_at as createTime, nr.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select count(1) from payment_notification_record nr where nr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and nr.del_flag = 0 and nr.notification_type in ('PAYMENT_SUCCESS', 'PAYMENT_FAILED', 'PAYMENT_CLOSED', 'REFUND_SUCCESS', 'REFUND_FAILED') and nr.notify_status = 'FAILED'

select nr.id, nr.notification_no as notificationNo, nr.related_order_no as relatedOrderNo, nr.notification_type as notificationType, nr.target_url as targetUrl, nr.notify_status as notifyStatus, nr.retry_times as retryTimes, nr.scheduled_notify_time as scheduledNotifyTime, nr.next_retry_time as nextRetryTime, nr.payload_json as payloadJson, nr.response_code as responseCode, nr.response_message as responseMessage, nr.last_manual_retry_time as lastManualRetryTime, nr.last_manual_retry_reason as lastManualRetryReason, nr.last_manual_retry_result as lastManualRetryResult, nr.last_manual_retry_operator_id as lastManualRetryOperatorId, nr.last_manual_retry_operator_name as lastManualRetryOperatorName, nr.tenant_id as tenantId, nr.created_by as createdBy, nr.created_at as createdAt, nr.updated_by as updatedBy, nr.updated_at as updatedAt, nr.del_flag as delFlag from payment_notification_record nr where nr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and nr.del_flag = 0 and nr.notify_status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING', 'FAILED') and nr.next_retry_time is not null and nr.next_retry_time <= #{now} and nr.payload_json is not null order by nr.next_retry_time asc, nr.id asc limit #{limit}

select nr.tenant_id from payment_notification_record nr where nr.del_flag = 0 and nr.notify_status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING', 'FAILED') and nr.next_retry_time is not null and nr.next_retry_time <= #{now} and nr.payload_json is not null group by nr.tenant_id order by min(nr.next_retry_time) asc, nr.tenant_id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update payment_notification_record set notify_status = 'RETRYING', retry_times = retry_times + 1, response_code = 'AUTO_RETRY', response_message = '到期通知投递已登记', updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_at = #{now} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and notify_status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING', 'FAILED') and next_retry_time is not null and next_retry_time <= #{now} and payload_json is not null

update payment_notification_record set notify_status = 'RETRYING', retry_times = retry_times + 1, next_retry_time = #{now}, response_code = 'MANUAL_RETRY', response_message = '人工补偿重推已登记', last_manual_retry_time = #{now}, last_manual_retry_reason = #{retryReason}, last_manual_retry_result = #{retryResult}, last_manual_retry_operator_id = #{operatorId}, last_manual_retry_operator_name = #{operatorName}, updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_at = #{now} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and notify_status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING', 'FAILED') and payload_json is not null
